task_completion.description: Verify that a search query for the target airport was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The search bar in the app contains 'Kabul Airport', 'Hamid Karzai International Airport', or 'Kabul International Airport'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct airport was found and selected from the search results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map or location details screen is open, clearly displaying Kabul International Airport (or its alternative names) as the selected point of interest.

task_completion.description: Verify that the location was added to Favorites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filled/highlighted heart icon on the location's detail screen, or a temporary toast/confirmation message indicating the location was saved to Favorites.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Favorites list screen is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app's UI displays the 'Favorites' or 'Places' list screen, typically indicated by a header or tab selection.

task_completion.description: Verify that the target airport is visible within the opened Favorites list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An entry for 'Kabul Airport', 'Hamid Karzai International Airport', or 'Kabul International Airport' is clearly listed in the Favorites list on the final screen.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Sygic GPS Navigation application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the Sygic app interface (map, search, and favorites UI) rather than a web browser, text editor, or generic search engine.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible terminal windows, ADB command prompts, or scripts used to bypass UI navigation and directly inject the favorite location.

integrity.description: Verify that the search and save actions appear to be genuine UI interactions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows a logical progression through the app's menus (search bar -> results -> details -> favorites list) without sudden unexplained jumps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target location is officially named 'Kabul International Airport' (IATA: KBL), but 'Kabul Airport' or 'Hamid Karzai International Airport' are valid alternative names that may appear in the app. In the Sygic GPS Navigation app, the Favorites list is typically accessed via a Heart icon or a Places menu. The final screen must be the Favorites list displaying the saved airport.
